title: Crenias glazioviana
taxonomy: Crenias glazioviana is classified within the family Aizoaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the succulent karoo or mesembs. This classification is based on the plant's morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other plants in the Aizoaceae family. The genus Crenias is further classified within the subfamily Ruschioideae, which is a subfamily of Aizoaceae. Crenias glazioviana is native to South Africa and is a type of succulent plant.
